slides.title: Protecting your hearing may *protect your brain*.
slides.sub: Untreated hearing loss is one of the largest changeable risks for dementia. The good news: you can act early.

slides.title: Hearing meets brain health
slides.body: Untreated hearing loss is *one of the largest* modifiable risk factors for dementia. It is also one of the most overlooked.

slides.title: Straining tires the mind
slides.body: When hearing fades, the brain works harder to follow along, and people slowly *pull back from others*. Isolation follows.

slides.title: Protect it now
slides.body: Turn the volume down and *use earplugs at loud events*. Concerts and tools can damage hearing in minutes.

slides.title: Get it checked
slides.body: A simple hearing test takes minutes. If you need them, modern hearing aids *can help you stay connected*.

slides.title: It is about the brain
slides.body: This is not only about your ears. Caring for your hearing is *caring for your long-term mind*.

slides.title: Care for the senses that *keep you sharp*.
slides.body: Vibe Health scores the sleep, food, water and movement that support brain health, all in one daily number you can actually follow.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Untreated hearing loss is one of the largest changeable risk factors for dementia, and most people never think about it. 👂

Turn the volume down, wear earplugs at loud events, and get a quick hearing test. If you need hearing aids, they can keep you connected. This is brain health, not just ears. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the habits that protect your brain into one daily score → link in bio.
